about archive

tag: meta


I'm using Eleventy as the static site generator for this blog. And I have to say I'm not fully sold on it. It seems fairly simple, which is what I want. And customising it hasn't been too tricky.

However the tool for showing the website locally before then building it is pretty rough. Buggy and slow and just behaves oddly.

Sep 1, 2023 · 1:35 PM


Site is starting to come along. Simple. But at least it looks a bit 'Twitter-y', which is what I'm going for.

Sep 1, 2023 · 1:31 PM
